meaning: n.闃跨暀鐢崇兢宀涗箣鍦熶汉
examples: The volcanoes are Pavlof and Cleveland, both in the Aleutian Island range southwest of mainland Alaska.
Sea otter populations off the Aleutian Islands have dropped by 80-90 percent since the 1970s.
In 1943, American forces secured the Aleutian island of Attu from the Japanese during World War II.
